body_excerpt: In shouldHideNotification of KeyguardNotificationVisibilityProvider.kt, there is a possible way to show hidden notifications due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
